category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Indonesian market (mandatory SNI certification, ESDM energy labelling, and SDPPI radio approval versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification).

target_market_label.zh: 印度尼西亚（SNI / 工业部）

title.en: China-to-Indonesia LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入印度尼西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入印尼：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Indonesia's mandatory SNI certification (SPPT-SNI and the SNI mark via an accredited LSPro, regulated by Kemenperin / BSN), ESDM energy efficiency labelling (label hemat energi), SDPPI radio/telecom approval for smart lighting, and restricted-substance / B3 hazardous-material and e-waste rules, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与印度尼西亚强制性 SNI 认证（经认可 LSPro 颁发的 SPPT-SNI 及 SNI 标志，由工业部（Kemenperin）/ 国家标准局（BSN）监管）、能源矿产资源部（ESDM）能效标签（label hemat energi）、智能照明的 SDPPI 无线电/电信核准，以及限用物质 / B3 有害物质和电子废弃物规则的差距对照，并与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與印度尼西亞強制性 SNI 認證（經認可 LSPro 頒發的 SPPT-SNI 及 SNI 標誌，由工業部（Kemenperin）/ 國家標準局（BSN）監管）、能源礦產資源部（ESDM）能效標籤（label hemat energi）、智能照明的 SDPPI 無線電/電信核准，以及限用物質 / B3 有害物質和電子廢棄物規則的差距對照，並與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment body determination, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Indonesian law, applicable SNI standards, Kemenperin and BSN technical regulations (Permenperin), ESDM energy labelling thresholds, SDPPI radio requirements, and B3 hazardous-substance rules with qualified professionals and an accredited LSPro before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构认定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及经认可的 LSPro 核验现行印度尼西亚法律、适用 SNI 标准、工业部及国家标准局技术法规（Permenperin）、ESDM 能效标签阈值、SDPPI 无线电要求及 B3 有害物质规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構認定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及經認可的 LSPro 核驗現行印度尼西亞法律、適用 SNI 標準、工業部及國家標準局技術法規（Permenperin）、ESDM 能效標籤閾值、SDPPI 無線電要求及 B3 有害物質規則。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Indonesia must obtain mandatory SNI certification (SPPT-SNI plus the right to apply the SNI mark) issued by an accredited LSPro through type testing and an audit of the factory quality management system, against the applicable SNI such as SNI IEC 60598 for luminaires and the SNI for self-ballasted LED lamps; comply with ESDM energy efficiency labelling (label hemat energi / star rating) where the product is in scope; obtain SDPPI radio/telecom approval for smart lighting with Wi-Fi or Bluetooth; cover restricted-substance, B3 hazardous-material, and e-waste obligations (Indonesia has no single horizontal RoHS-style law); and route the goods through an in-country importer holding an NIB / API-U, with goods entering via Tanjung Priok or Tanjung Perak. None of these are covered by existing Chinese CCC certification or GB test reports, which are not recognised in Indonesia.
answer_first.zh: 向印度尼西亚出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：取得强制性 SNI 认证（SPPT-SNI 及使用 SNI 标志的权利），由经认可的 LSPro 通过型式试验及工厂质量管理体系审核颁发，依据适用 SNI（如灯具的 SNI IEC 60598 及自镇流 LED 灯的 SNI）；在产品属适用范围时符合 ESDM 能效标签（label hemat energi / 星级）；为具备 Wi-Fi 或蓝牙的智能照明取得 SDPPI 无线电/电信核准；覆盖限用物质、B3 有害物质及电子废弃物义务（印度尼西亚无单一横向 RoHS 式法律）；并通过持有 NIB / API-U 的在地进口商办理通关，货物经丹戎不碌（Tanjung Priok）或丹戎佩拉（Tanjung Perak）入境。上述均不被现有中国 CCC 认证或 GB 检测报告所涵盖，后者在印度尼西亚不被承认。
answer_first.zht: 向印度尼西亞出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：取得強制性 SNI 認證（SPPT-SNI 及使用 SNI 標誌的權利），由經認可的 LSPro 通過型式試驗及工廠質量管理體系審核頒發，依據適用 SNI（如燈具的 SNI IEC 60598 及自鎮流 LED 燈的 SNI）；在產品屬適用範圍時符合 ESDM 能效標籤（label hemat energi / 星級）；為具備 Wi-Fi 或藍牙的智能照明取得 SDPPI 無線電/電信核准；覆蓋限用物質、B3 有害物質及電子廢棄物義務（印度尼西亞無單一橫向 RoHS 式法律）；並通過持有 NIB / API-U 的在地進口商辦理通關，貨物經丹戎不碌（Tanjung Priok）或丹戎佩拉（Tanjung Perak）入境。上述均不被現有中國 CCC 認證或 GB 檢測報告所涵蓋，後者在印度尼西亞不被承認。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Indonesian regulator, standards body (BSN), ministry (Kemenperin / ESDM / SDPPI), SNI standard reference, or primary legal source (Permenperin / government regulation) preferred. Local PDFs and non-official secondary sources are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. Mandatory SNI scope, ESDM energy labelling thresholds, and B3 substance lists must be re-verified against the current Permenperin and ESDM regulations on each review cycle.
